title: alsophila nicklesii
intro: Alsophila nicklesii, also known as the Queensland tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alsophila nicklesii include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent.
